mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contents_mst WHERE DELETED_YN = 'N' OR DELETED_YN IS NULL) AS totalPostCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tags_mst) AS totalTagCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(VIEW_CNT), 0) FROM contents_view_stats) AS totalViewCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CMMT_CNT), 0) FROM contents_cmmt_stats) AS totalCommentCount
